scripts.build:frontend-user: yarn build:shared && yarn workspace easecation-user-center-frontend-user run build
scripts.build:frontend-admin: yarn build:shared && yarn workspace easecation-user-center-frontend-admin run build
scripts.mock: yarn build:shared && concurrently "yarn mock:backend" "yarn dev:user" "yarn dev:admin"
scripts.type-check:shared: yarn build:shared && yarn workspace @ecuc/shared run type-check
scripts.type-check:frontend-user: yarn build:shared && yarn workspace easecation-user-center-frontend-user run type-check
scripts.type-check:frontend-admin: yarn build:shared && yarn workspace easecation-user-center-frontend-admin run type-check
scripts.type-check: yarn type-check:shared && yarn type-check:frontend-user && yarn type-check:frontend-admin && yarn type-check:mock-backend
scripts.test: yarn test:frontend-user && yarn test:frontend-admin && yarn test:mock-backend
